'''wagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:idently|idently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:idently|idently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wagate|wagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wagatesher|wagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wagatesherĂ«m|wagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wagatero|wagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wagateshĂ«|wagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wagateshĂ«m|wagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwagatero|gokiwagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwagateshĂ«|gokiwagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwagateshĂ«m|gokiwagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowagankerom|gowagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowagankeshĂ«|gowagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowagankeshĂ«m|gowagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowagankeya|gowagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wagaterom|wagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wagatemu|wagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wagateya|wagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwagaterom|gokiwagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwagatemu|gokiwagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwagateya|gokiwagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wagagate|wagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wagagatesher|wagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wagagatesherĂ«m|wagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wagagatero|wagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wagagateshĂ«|wagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wagagateshĂ«m|wagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwagagatero|gokiwagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwagagateshĂ«|gokiwagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwagagateshĂ«m|gokiwagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowagagankerom|gowagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowagagankeshĂ«|gowagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowagagankeshĂ«m|gowagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowagagankeya|gowagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wagagaterom|wagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wagagatemu|wagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wagagateya|wagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwagagaterom|gokiwagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwagagatemu|gokiwagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwagagateya|gokiwagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠte|wĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠtesher|wĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠtero|wĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠgĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠterom|wĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠtemu|wĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠgĂŠteya|wĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠgĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠgĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafgafte|wafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafgaftesher|wafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafgaftesherĂ«m|wafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafgaftero|wafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafgafteshĂ«|wafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafgafteshĂ«m|wafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafgaftero|gokiwafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafgafteshĂ«|gokiwafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafgafteshĂ«m|gokiwafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafgafnkerom|gowafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafgafnkeshĂ«|gowafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafgafnkeshĂ«m|gowafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafgafnkeya|gowafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafgafterom|wafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafgaftemu|wafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafgafteya|wafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafgafterom|gokiwafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafgaftemu|gokiwafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafgafteya|gokiwafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
